---
title: "gradient_smoothness"
generated: true
description: "Diffusion (first-order) smoothness penalty $ | nabla u |^2$."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register.regulariser`](../nitrix-register-regulariser.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:gradient_smoothness -->
```python
gradient_smoothness(field: Float[Array, '*spatial ndim'], *, reduction: Reduction = 'mean') -> Float[Array, '...']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:gradient_smoothness -->
Diffusion (first-order) smoothness penalty $\|\nabla u\|^2$.

The squared Frobenius norm of the displacement Jacobian
$\nabla u$ (recovered as $J - I$ from
[`geometry.jacobian_displacement`](../nitrix-geometry-grid/jacobian_displacement.qmd)), summed over the
$\mathrm{ndim} \times \mathrm{ndim}$ derivative entries at
each voxel. Penalises sharp or incoherent flow.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:gradient_smoothness -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `field` | `Float` | `*spatial` × `ndim` | — | Channels-last displacement field `(*spatial, ndim)`, with the trailing axis holding the `ndim` displacement components. |
| `reduction` | `Reduction` | — | `'mean'` | How the per-voxel energy is reduced: `"mean"` (default) or `"sum"` collapse the spatial axes to a scalar, while `"none"` returns the unreduced per-voxel energy map. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...`. The scalar total (for `"mean"` / `"sum"`) or the per-voxel energy map of shape `(*spatial,)` (for `"none"`).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:gradient_smoothness -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
| `ndim` | number of spatial dimensions |
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
